item.text: I’ll implement a compact legal-move generator and then exercise it with positions covering ordinary moves, check evasion, castling, en passant, and promotion. I’ll keep the workspace limited to the requested `agent.js`.
`agent.js` is now in place. I’m checking syntax, size, and representative outputs, with extra attention to castling attack-through-square validation and en-passant legality under discovered check.

The first test exposed an orientation bug in FEN loading: the board ranks were mirrored vertically. I’m correcting that before further validation; the move generator itself was then being tested against the wrong coordinates.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "for spec in \\
  'r3k2r/8/8/8/8/8/8/R3K2R w KQkq - 0 1' \\
  '4k3/8/8/3pP3/8/8/8/4K3 w - d6 0 1' \\
  '4k3/P7/8/8/8/8/8/4K3 w - - 0 1'; do printf '%s' \""'$spec" | node -e '"'const fs=require(\"fs\"),vm=require(\"vm\");let x=fs.readFileSync(\"agent.js\",\"utf8\");x=x.replace(\"if (chosen) process.stdout.write(square(chosen.from) + square(chosen.to) + (chosen.promo ? chosen.promo.toLowerCase() : \\\"\\\"));\",\"process.stdout.write(legal.map(m=>square(m.from)+square(m.to)+(m.promo?m.promo.toLowerCase():\\\"\\\")).join(\\\" \\\") );\");vm.runInThisContext(x)' ; printf '\\n'; done"

item.text: The corrected loader now produces legal coordinates. The special-move enumeration confirms legal castling, en passant, and all four promotion choices; I’m doing the final black-side and output-purity checks now.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "node --check agent.js && wc -c agent.js && for fen in \\
  'r3k2r/8/8/8/8/8/8/R3K2R b KQkq - 0 1' \\
  '4k3/8/8/8/8/8/p7/4K3 b - - 0 1' \\
  '4k3/8/8/8/3pP3/8/8/4K3 b - e3 0 1'; do printf '%s' \""'$fen" | node -e '"'const src=require(\"fs\").readFileSync(\"agent.js\",\"utf8\"); new Function(src.replace(/if \\(chosen\\).*"'$/m,"process.stdout.write(legal.map(m=>square(m.from)+square(m.to)+(m.promo?m.promo.toLowerCase():'"\\\"\\\")).join(\\\" \\\"));\"))();'; printf '\\n'; done
printf '%s' 'r3k2r/8/8/8/8/8/8/R3K2R w KQkq - 0 1' | node agent.js | od -An -tx1"

/bin/zsh -lc "node --check agent.js && wc -c agent.js && for fen in \\

item.text:
Created exactly one file: [agent.js](/var/folders/1t/tn_3vh3x0nv_snwb7xrv97th0000gn/T/agentbattler-luna-pSjs5Q/workspace/agent.js).

It is 6,816 bytes, syntax-checked, and tested for normal moves, check evasion, castling, en passant, promotion, and both sides to move.
